# Contributing

The canonical contribution guide lives at the repository root: **[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)**.

In short:

- Follow the conventions in [STRUCTURE.md](../STRUCTURE.md).
- Never write placeholder text; prefer depth over breadth.
- Keep terminology consistent with the [GLOSSARY.md](../GLOSSARY.md).
- Run `python scripts/check-links.py` before opening a PR.

See the root guide for the full details and the per-type (department / agent / starter kit) instructions.
